# ITLibMediaItemVideoInfo

**Class**

This class encapsulates the video information of a video media item.

## Declaration

```swift
class ITLibMediaItemVideoInfo
```

## Overview

Video media items include TV shows, movies, and video podcasts.

## Getting Video Information

- **videoWidth**: The width of the video in pixels.
- **videoHeight**: The height of the video in pixels.
- **series**: The name of the corresponding TV series, if the media item is an episode in a TV series.
- **sortSeries**: The sorting name of the corresponding TV series, if the media item is an episode in a TV series.
- **season**: The corresponding TV season, if the media item is an episode of a TV series.
- **isHD**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the video is high-definition.
- **episode**: The name of the episode, if the media item is an episode of a TV series.
- **episodeOrder**: The numerical order of the episode, if the media item is an episode of a TV series.

## Media Items

- **ITLibMediaItem**: This class describes a media item (a track) in the iTunes library, such as a song, a video, or a podcast.
- **ITLibMediaEntity**: This class describes a media entity, which can be a media item, such as an audio track.
- **ITLibArtist**: This class represents an artist, such as the performer of a song.
- **ITLibArtwork**: This class represents the artwork for a media item.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
